why: Learn to code so I can build a real side project, automate repetitive tasks in my life or work, and finally understand how software and computers actually work.
successCriteria: I can write and run small Go programs from scratch without hand-holding
I understand what a program is, what running code means, and how files become output
I can use Go to solve a small real problem as a capstone
constraints: Complete beginner — explain jargon before using it
Solo learning with the agent as teacher
